subject: [PATCH v4 1/5] tracing/lock: Remove unnecessary linux/sched.h include

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Acked the patch, indicating no objections or concerns.
reviews.raw_body:
On Thu, 26 Mar 2026 15:10:00 +0000 Dmitry Ilvokhin <d@ilvokhin.com> wrote:

> None of the trace events in lock.h reference anything from
> linux/sched.h. Remove the unnecessary include.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Dmitry Ilvokhin <d@ilvokhin.com>
> ---
>  include/trace/events/lock.h | 1 -
>  1 file changed, 1 deletion(-)
> 

Acked-by: Usama Arif <usama.arif@linux.dev>

2026-03-31.patch_summary: This patch series removes unnecessary includes from the tracing/lock code, starting with a simple removal of linux/sched.h in lock.h.
